title: Steam Weapons
description: Steampunk-Themed resource pack rethinking the Minecraft weapons!
body:
![[Main Title: Steam Weapons]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b3825fa13a72b9d637ef41fc72e061b1da3bd9a_0.webp)

**Steam Weapons** is a Steampunk-Themed texture pack modifying the weapons models depending on the enchantment it contains.

This pack has no dependencies, works entirely vanilla (For now).


![[Main Weapons: Mace - Bow - Sword]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/078a5527342177dafd77c4a292d9a590e0edf56f_0.webp)

![[Mace variants]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62d4a87a4569ca18697096ed0e35e2846eff8354_0.webp)

![[Bow variants]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f417093cb669fa67c0e8f3b18e939e4c2219fe3_0.webp)

![[Bow variants rename: Gun]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59ff83e40c9d85130a2379dbe438a60ce4d15d70_0.webp)

![[Bow variants rename: Slingshot]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d636dc267f2ac217eafd68463b56f97f2dadd67f_0.webp)

![[Sword variants]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e93d2973598c89d68f4009d86915eda6bbfd47fa_0.webp)

![[Coming soon: Crossbow, Bow, Axe, Sword, Armor]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4ded07bf0651aaa8cb5a73b30d2affd36f35e72_0.webp)

# Notes

For now the Iron Sword is the only available tier due to feedback, if you feel the models are overloaded let me know.

Wood, Stone, Copper, Gold, Diamond and Netherite tiers will come eventually along with new CIT models.

Also Enchantment glint animation is disabled.


Found a bug or want to make a recommendation? Let me know in my PM account :) [Link in Report Issues tab]
